audit_summary.note: All 660 examples contain only tool_call structures (JSON responses). No plain text outside tool_call detected. Tool calls are technical structures and inherently contain JSON keys/values with English terms (name, arguments, document_type, counterparty, subject, etc.), which are necessary structural elements and not model-generated natural language.

methodology.excluded: tool_call XML tags and their contents
methodology.result: Clean dataset - no non-Russian content found in natural language responses
